calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition For Order Confirming Title To Real Property
Off Calendar Sep-01-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kelley Lincoln, via ZOOM, for Oleg Kovrizhnyky, Petitioner.

The court begins by confirming with Ms. Lincoln that she has seen the Examiner's notes. The court then advises Ms. Lincoln that it believes that this matter should have been filed as an action to quiet title and not as an 850 petition. Counsel does not provide argument regarding the court's position.

The Petition for Order Confirming Title to Real Property is denied in open court. The court will prepare and issue an order thereon.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION Petition For Order Confirming Title To Real Property
Off Calendar Jul-07-2021 Continued To Sep-01-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kelley Lincoln, via ZOOM, for Oleg Kovrizhnyky and Alena Kovrizhnyky, Petitioners.

The court at the outset advises counsel as to some of the court's threshold issues including whether San Francisco is the proper venue for this matter and whether notice is proper. Counsel provides oral testimony to support the petition. The court then directs counsel to review and respond to the Examiner's notes prior to the next calling of this matter.

The Petition for Order Confirming Title to Real Property is continued to September 1, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.
